case_title: CHARLES BENKENDORF VS. DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AARON SINEL--EUP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENKENDORF, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,764.63 FILED BY BENKENDORF, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-17-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2013 - JUDGMENT.
